benchmark.name: IsoBench-MRNN
benchmark.principle: Isomorphic representations must produce invariant resonance

L1_Sensory.content: RGB pixel array of equilateral triangle, red fill (#FF0000), blue background (#0000FF), rotation 0°

L3_Relational.content: 3-node cycle graph with color attributes and spatial positions

L4_Contextual.content: A red triangle stands against a blue background, its three points reaching upward like a flame.

data.invariant: 3-sided polygon with minimal area for given perimeter

L1_Sensory.content: RGB pixel array of circle, green fill (#00FF00), black background (#000000), center at (100,100), radius 60

L3_Relational.content: Single node with radial edges to perimeter points, cyclic closure

L4_Contextual.content: A perfect green circle rests in darkness, complete unto itself, with no beginning and no end, a world contained.

L1_Sensory.content: RGB pixel array of 5-point star, yellow fill (#FFFF00), purple background (#800080), rotation 36°

L2_Structural.content: draw_star(points=5, outer_r=80, inner_r=35, fill='#FFFF00', bg='#800080', rotation=36)

L3_Relational.content: Central hub with 5 radial spokes, each spoke bifurcates to inner and outer points

L4_Contextual.content: A golden star bursts forth from violet depths, five rays of light piercing the darkness, a beacon calling from afar.

L1_Sensory.content: RGB pixel array of hexagon, teal fill (#008080), coral background (#FF7F50), rotation 30°

L3_Relational.content: 6 nodes in cyclic arrangement, each connected to 2 neighbors, forming a closed hexagonal lattice cell

L4_Contextual.content: Six sides meet in perfect balance, teal against coral, a honeycomb cell holding the sweetness of order.

L1_Sensory.content: RGB pixel array of square, white fill (#FFFFFF), black background (#000000), rotation 15°

L2_Structural.content: draw_rectangle(top_left=(50,50), width=100, height=100, fill='#FFFFFF', bg='#000000', rotation=15)

L3_Relational.content: 4 nodes forming a cycle with 90° angles, representing cardinality and foundation

L4_Contextual.content: A white square tilts slightly in the void, four corners holding the world in place, the foundation before all foundations.

L1_Sensory.content: RGB pixel array of pentagon, orange fill (#FFA500), indigo background (#4B0082), rotation 0°

L3_Relational.content: 5 nodes in cyclic arrangement, the human form, the microcosm

L4_Contextual.content: Five sides contain the human form, orange against indigo, the microcosm standing within the macrocosm's deep dream.

L1_Sensory.content: RGB pixel array of heptagon, violet fill (#8B00FF), gold background (#FFD700), rotation 0°

L3_Relational.content: 7 nodes in cyclic arrangement, the number of mystery, the days of creation, the notes of the scale

L4_Contextual.content: Seven sides hold the mystery, violet against gold, the days of creation sealed in geometry's ancient song.

L1_Sensory.content: RGB pixel array of octagon, silver fill (#C0C0C0), maroon background (#800000), rotation 22.5°

L3_Relational.content: 8 nodes in cyclic arrangement, the stop sign, the bagua, the directions of the wind

L4_Contextual.content: Eight sides mark the directions, silver on maroon, the bagua's mirror reflecting all paths at once.

L1_Sensory.content: RGB pixel array of nonagon, crimson fill (#DC143C), emerald background (#50C878), rotation 0°

L3_Relational.content: 9 nodes in cyclic arrangement, the enneagram, the completion before the decade

L4_Contextual.content: Nine sides near completion, crimson on emerald, the enneagram's path winding toward the final gate.

consistency_tests.description: All 5 representations of the same concept must produce identical resonance vectors
Transducer must preserve meaning when converting between representations
procedure: 1. Take L1 image → transduce to L4 text → compute resonance
2. Take L4 text → transduce to L1 image → compute resonance
3. Compare with direct L1 and L4 resonance

consistency_tests.description: Color-emotion mapping must be consistent across modalities
procedure: 2. Extract color from L2 code (fill parameter)
3. Extract color from L4 text (color words)
4. Map each to emotion via Lindborg lookup
5. Assert all three map to the same emotion cluster

consistency_tests.description: Each representation must map to the correct D-layer
Shape sides must map to correct I Ching gate

cross_modal_consistency_loss.description: Minimize distance between resonance vectors from different representations of the same concept

transduction_cycle_loss.description: Transducer forward + inverse should return to original resonance

dimensional_routing_loss.description: Correctly route each representation level to its corresponding D-layer

emotion_color_binding_loss.description: Same concept's color must map to same emotion across modalities
